'''kadhangab''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whitenoise|whitenoise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whitenoise|whitenoise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kadhangab
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thidhangab || jidhangab || shidhangab || kidhangab
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthudhangab || jujudhangab || shushudhangab || kukudhangab
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thudhangab || judhangab || shudhangab || kudhangab
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thudhangab || judhangab || shudhangab || kudhangab
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thedhangab || jedhangab || shedhangab || kedhangab
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothodhangab || jojodhangab || shoshodhangab || kokodhangab
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thodhangab || jodhangab || shodhangab || kodhangab
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thodhangab || jodhangab || shodhangab || kodhangab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab || dhangab
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thædhangab || jædhangab || shædhangab || kædhangab
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathadhangab || jajadhangab || shashadhangab || kakadhangab
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thadhangab || jadhangab || shadhangab || kadhangab
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thadhangab || jadhangab || shadhangab || kadhangab
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shadhangab
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshadhangab
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishadhangab
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shadhangabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshadhangabnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishadhangabnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shadhangabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshadhangabnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishadhangabshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shadhangabro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshadhangabnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishadhangabro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shadhangabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshadhangabnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishadhangabmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shadhangabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshadhangabnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishadhangabsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shadhangabng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshadhangabnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishadhangabng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shadhangabya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshadhangabnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishadhangabya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shadhangabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshadhangabnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishadhangabyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shadhangabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshadhangabnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishadhangabnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhangabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhangabnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhangabnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shadhangabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhangabnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhangabnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shadhangabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshadhangabnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishadhangabshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhangabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhangabnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhangabshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shadhangabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhangabnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhangabshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shadhangabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshadhangabnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishadhangabronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shadhangabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshadhangabnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishadhangabroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shadhangabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshadhangabnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishadhangabromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shadhangabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshadhangabnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishadhangabmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shadhangabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshadhangabnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishadhangabmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shadhangabmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshadhangabnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishadhangabmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|1a38ba0}}
